text: T-023 idea-mining. Mine **Devpost** (recent/popular/winning hackathon projects) and **Y Combinator's Request for Startups (RFS)** for ideas ONE TEN STUDIO could actually ship. Produce tasks/T-023/IDEAS.md: a FILTERED shortlist (~8-12) where each idea is (a) buildable as a working web/AI product in roughly ONE WEEK by a small AI-accelerated studio (NO heavy hardware / no big infra / no regulated-data nightmares), (b) has a plausible MONETIZATION path (who pays, how), and (c) isn't hopelessly saturated. For each: idea (1 line) · source (Devpost/YC RFS + link) · why ONE TEN can build it fast · monetization angle · difficulty (L/M/H). Put the 3 strongest at the top with a one-line 'why this one'. Skip anything needing hardware, medical/financial licensing, or huge data. Commit + warroom-say.
